claim: Gemma 3 models are multimodal (4B, 12B, 27B versions) with 128k context and trained on 2x multilingual data vs Gemma 2
actionable: Use Gemma 3 models for vision tasks and multilingual work; prefer the 12B quantized over other open models for inference cost
source_title: Gemma 3 - The NEW Gemma Family Members Have Arrived!!!

claim: Google released both base models and instruction-fine-tuned versions, enabling custom fine-tuning (unlike recent proprietary releases)
actionable: Use Gemma 3 base models to fine-tune for domain-specific tasks; this was missing from Gemma 2 release
source_title: Gemma 3 - The NEW Gemma Family Members Have Arrived!!!

claim: Gemma 3 27B is comparable to Gemini 1.5 Pro despite being a small open model, indicating rapid open-source improvement
actionable: Test Gemma 3 27B as a cost-effective alternative to proprietary APIs for tasks within its capability range
source_title: Gemma 3 - The NEW Gemma Family Members Have Arrived!!!

claim: Knowledge distillation and RoPE scaling enabled Gemma 3 to achieve 128k context efficiently without massive compute overhead
actionable: When building long-context models, use knowledge distillation from larger models and RoPE scaling techniques
source_title: Gemma 3 - The NEW Gemma Family Members Have Arrived!!!

claim: Gemma 3 can be used for zero-shot OCR, handwriting recognition, and LaTeX generation without dedicated OCR fine-tuning
actionable: Use Gemma 3 for document processing tasks (OCR, handwriting, math equation extraction) without specialized models
source_title: Gemma 3 - The NEW Gemma Family Members Have Arrived!!!
